goals: Define the content architecture: pillar structure, content types, and narrative arc
Map the content calendar skeleton: 30-day launch window with channel-specific cadence
Establish the brand narrative for AIWF v21 that differentiates from all three mapped competitors

acceptance_criteria.description: Content pillar map with 4 pillars, 3 content types each
30-day content calendar skeleton with channel assignments
Brand narrative document: sovereign positioning statement + 3 proof points
